title: anthemis pectinata
intro: Anthemis pectinata, also known as sea chamomile or false chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of anthemis pectinata include soothing digestive issues, relieving anxiety and stress, and reducing inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Anthemis pectinata can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed orally or used topically in creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
